raw_text:
```json
{
  "claim_texts": [
    "SB 553 requires employers to develop their own workplace violence prevention plans as part of their Cal/OSHA Injury and Illness Prevention Plans.",
    "Employees must be informed of workplace violence prevention plans and prepare accordingly.",
    "SB 553 is a result of months-long negotiation between workers, businesses, and Cal/OSHA.",
    "SB 553 will help workers and employers establish a plan for types of workplace violence that are on the rise.",
    "SB 553 mandates that workplace violence prevention plans be included as part of existing Injury and Illness Prevention Programs (IIPP).",
    "Cal/OSHA has worked on a workplace violence prevention plan known as the Workplace Violence General Industry Draft for six years.",
    "SB 553 accelerates the creation of the Workplace Violence General Industry Draft standard by placing it into effect on July 1, 2024.",
    "There has been a misinformation campaign initiated by large corporations opposing alterations to the IIPP regarding SB 553."
  ]
}
```
